name: Ganesh Housing Corporation Limited
summary: Ganesh Housing Corporation Limited engages in the real estate and construction businesses in India. It is involved in the promotion and development of residential, commercial, retail, and township projects. As of March 31, 2020, the company had a land bank of approximately 639.13 acres. It also constructs infrastructure projects. The company was formerly known as Ganesh Housing Finance Corporation Limited. Ganesh Housing Corporation Limited was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India.
